message:
fix(drasi): match original layout — vertical trunks, dashed/solid flow, node controls (#7857)

Rewrite DrasiReactiveGraph to match the reference image from the Drasi PM:

- SVG-based trunk/branch flow topology: vertical trunks between columns with
  horizontal branches to each node (was: single horizontal arrow between columns)
- Dashed lines for inactive paths, solid lines with animated dots for active
  paths (was: all identical horizontal arrows)
- Node controls on every card: red stop button, expand icon, pin icon —
  matching the Drasi UI affordances in the reference image
- Results table nested INSIDE the selected query node (was: full-width
  separate section below the graph)
- Portrait orientation — default card size is now w:6 h:8 (was: w:12 h:5)
- DEMO RESULTS label in demo mode, LIVE RESULTS label when connected to a
  real Drasi instance (was: always LIVE RESULTS)
- Fix ghost-data bleed on refresh: remove AnimatePresence/popLayout and
  unstable index-based keys; use stable symbol-based keys with no exit
  animation, and ensure the card has overflow:hidden

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
